title: lastrea plumosa
intro: Lastrea plumosa, also known as the Plumose Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to Asia and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Lastrea plumosa are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lastrea plumosa include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are said to provide several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties.
